title: Requiem for a Gringo
writer: Arrigo Colombo, Enrico Colombo, Giuliana Garavaglia
actors: Lang Jeffries, Femi Benussi, Fernando Sancho
plot: A gang of desperadoes, on the run after a robbery, kills the brother of a rancher. The latter swears revenge. He hunts down the bandits and takes them out one by one.
